title: PESTO scheduling UI: banner toggle vs. dropdown
summary: Which drives PESTO adoption, a discrete scheduling dropdown or eye-catching banner toggle? The discrete dropdown did.
hypothesis: We believe that moving the schedule UI for PESTO campaigns to be via the schedule method dropdown list for new and existing PESTO users will keep engagement the same because it will be less visible. We will measure success using # of PESTO users, and monitor # of PESTO campaigns scheduled to ensure no negative impact.
results: The dropdown drove statistically significant lift across all three primary metrics: companies using PESTO, PESTO campaigns scheduled, and PESTO campaigns scheduled per company.
learning: Embedding a feature naturally into the customer workflow drives stronger adoption than highlighting it loudly with a banner. The dropdown meaningfully improved PESTO usage.
notes: Shoutout to partners in the campaigns team, Gil Hsu and Mahima Rao.
control_description: Banner/button toggle entry point for enabling Personalized Send Time
treatment_description: Scheduling options dropdown with an educational popover pointing users to PESTO

treatments.label: Treatment
treatments.description: Scheduling options dropdown with an educational popover pointing users to PESTO
